action_or_policy: Public Citizen Health Research Group v. Pizzella, No. 19-00166 (D.D.C. Jan. 11, 2021)
legal_question_or_outcome: OSHA rescinded annual electronic submission of detailed workplace injury and illness records while retaining summary reporting; the district court upheld the 2019 rule.
source_family: Institute for Policy Integrity Trump court roundup
review_note: Retain for FACT-001 development because the episode directly concerns the durability and public availability of safety data. FACT-001 has no issue page yet; do not create a placeholder or separate evidence page.

action_or_policy: Guedes v. Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms & Explosives, 920 F.3d 1 (D.C. Cir. 2019), followed by Garland v. Cargill, 602 U.S. 406 (2024)
legal_question_or_outcome: A presidential memorandum directed DOJ rulemaking on bump stocks; ATF reversed its prior interpretation, and the Supreme Court later held that the resulting rule exceeded statutory authority.
source_family: Institute for Policy Integrity Trump court roundup
review_note: Retain for REG-006 development because the primary materials directly connect presidential direction to agency rulemaking and a later statutory-authority holding. REG-006 has no issue page yet; do not route this episode to REG-002 or DOM-001 and do not create a placeholder or separate evidence page.
